cms-1: Multilayered Endpoint Security That Stops What Others Miss
cms-2: ESET Endpoint Antivirus pairs the proven NOD32 engine with machine learning, behavioral analysis, and cloud-powered threat intelligence. Lightest footprint in the industry. Thirty years of research behind every scan.
cms-6: Behavioral analysis evaluates every running application. Blocks ransomware-like processes even without known signatures. Automated rollback restores encrypted files from secure backups.
cms-8: Heuristics and machine learning identify never-before-seen malware before execution. Thirteen global R&D centers respond to first incidence anywhere on the globe.
cms-10: Advanced persistent threats blocked through multilayered detection. Pre-execution, during execution, and post-execution analysis covers the full malware lifecycle.
cms-12: Prevents unauthorized exfiltration and credential theft. Network Attack Protection blocks exploitation of unpatched vulnerabilities at the network level.
cms-14: Used since 1997. Neural networks classify threats in real time before execution begins.
cms-16: Monitors every process. Blocks ransomware behavior. Automatic file rollback from secure backups.
cms-18: Detects vulnerabilities at the network level. Blocks malware spreading, botnets, and brute-force attacks.
cms-20: Scans processes once they decloak in memory. Catches obfuscated malware invisible on disk.
cms-22: Executes suspicious samples in isolated virtual environments. Reveals real behavior hidden under obfuscation.
cms-24: Monitors browsers, readers, email clients, Java. Blocks exploitation techniques, not just CVE signatures.
cms-25: Proven protection while leaving system resources free. Runs on older hardware without upgrades, extending machine lifetime.
cms-26: One console. Every device. Deploy and manage from a single pane of glass.
cms-33: Built-in controls and reporting mapped to regulatory frameworks.
cms-40: Ready to Close the Security Gaps?
cms-41: Free endpoint security assessment. We audit your current protection and show you exactly where you're exposed.
